headline: Progress, further delay risk for Boeing Air Force One: report
summary: Boeing has made progress on its much-delayed new planes for the US president -- dubbed Air Force One when the leader is on board -- but the project remains vulnerable to potential further postponement, a government report said Thursday."Boeing made progress on some of the schedule risks that we previously reported" including the completion of the engineering design for the environmental control system and hiring and Boeing's hiring of "more qualified mechanics," according to an annual weapons re

headline: Trump's America250 Celebrations to Close Reagan National Airport for Nearly 15 Hours (UPDATED)
summary: Trump's FAA announces closure of DC airport during July 4th celebrations for 15 hours as 250th Independence Day looms.
